title: Comment from Rocha, David, HHS-ONC-2025-0005, HHS-ONC-2025-0005-0001, 2025-23896
comment_text:
ASTP/ONC should accelerate the industry’s transition from CDA/CCDA to FHIR Clinical Documents.
 
The implementers of CDA, CCDA would prefer an accelerated and clearly defined transition timeline to move from CDA/CCDA to FHIR Clinical Documents, as well as funding, support, and assistance to move the industry forward.

FHIR Clinical Documents IG reference
https://build.fhir.org/ig/HL7/fhir-clinical-document/en/index.html
